# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in game-club, please report it privately
via GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/mac-reichelt/game-club/security/advisories/new).

Please do **not** open a public issue for security problems.

We will acknowledge receipt within a few days and provide a fix timeline based on
severity. As a hobby project, response times are best-effort but vulnerabilities
affecting deployed users will be prioritized.

## Supported Versions

Only the `main` branch and the latest container image (`ghcr.io/mac-reichelt/game-club:latest`)
receive security updates.
